name: memex
description: A Claude-maintained wiki for any project. Hook-enforced doc discipline; LLM-owned knowledge base; ingest/query/lint loop, plus an optional self-hosted browsable docsite (memex-docsite) and an opt-in multi-agent autopilot coordinator that scans open questions / owner-actions and routes specialist reports to .memex/.inbox/. Inspired by Karpathy's llm-wiki gist.
